rejection_reason: compliance: email_spam_triggers — subject line contains 'URGENT' and 'FREE' which are known spam trigger words. These activate spam filters before the email reaches the inbox. Remove both words entirely.
text:
Subject: URGENT — FREE productivity audit for {{company}}, {{first_name}}

Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company}} recently scaled the operations team, which usually creates workflow bottlenecks that cost hours every week.

FlowAI saves teams an average of 2 hours per day. We're currently offering a FREE productivity audit to identify where {{company}} is losing the most time.

This is a time-sensitive opportunity — book your FREE session before spots fill up.

Worth a 15-minute call to get started?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
